        <title>Pulso · Finanzas Personales</title>

Ct8a2zeFzXh99xN1GEG3FDopbLJ8CMVsHkfU9Qi6pb7Wu7Exm8cTtR8vwYIqBA1VCBqqEDRUIWioQtBQhaChCkFDFYKGKgQNVQgaqhA0VOHipB78/NNX5ccPn7ypfI7xMKE7MuNtcz/6RdAdxMZK1OMh6JaaRkrU4yBoqELQUIWgoQpBQxWChioEDVUIGqoQNFQhaKhC0FAl6avtfvz+8/Ljp88/VD7H/CQ7oc1429yPw5Rk0LGxEvX8JBd000iJel6SCxq6ETRUIWioQtBQhaChCkFDFYKGKgQNVQgaqhA0VCFoqELQUIWgoQpBQxWChioEDVUIGqoQNFQhaKhC0FCFoKEKQUMVgoYqBA1VCBqqEDRUIWiocvzu/cejqb8JoA/v3n88YkJDFYKGKgQNVQgaqhyL7BbTU38jQBdFw0xoqELQUKUMmmUH5spslwkNVfaCZkpjbuxmmdBQpRI0Uxpz4WqVCQ1VnEG3mdJ37r8c9HjA5GvUO6GHjHrKmJ8+/9DL8Q+fvGn0OL7jf3jwqtHj+I5PaaDUtVm75Bgi6kP4QcZGHTouNurQcbFRh46bw0DpKtTkIGto3w/skH6QoVhjow/FGht9KNbY6OcwUIYUNYEvzs+uh/5GgJCYFUPUhGYrD1OLbTB6yUHUmEqT9hqtoYkaY2vaXOOTQqLGWNq01ilOThYxhC5Ds9O2HdMafevaVOd9aKJGX/poqdcYWYKgjT6H4iDTlbARY4jf7oMuFwgbLkMuU0db/xJ32sY615r0hI7IdZpyo+B/ukl65+HBCMoAAAAASUVORK5CYII=">
        <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
        <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
        <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Pulso">
        <meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
        <meta name="theme-color" content="#1C1810">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Josefin+Sans:wght@200;300;400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link href="./Dashboard Financiero_files/css2" rel="stylesheet">
        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
        <style>
        :root {
        --bg: #f5f0e8;
        --surface: #faf7f2;
        --surface2: #ede8de;
        --border: #ddd7c9;
        --accent: #8b6914;
        --accent2: #b8901f;
        --green: #3d7a5c;
        --red: #9b3535;
        --blue: #3d5a8a;
        --text: #2c2416;
        --muted: #9a8f7e;
        --font-display: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
        --font-body: "Jost", sans-serif;
        --font-mono: "DM Mono", monospace;
        }
        /* ===== TEMAS DE COLOR ===== */
        [data-theme="turquesa"] {
        --bg:#0d3d4a;--surface:#134e5e;--surface2:#1a6070;--border:#1e7a8a;
        --accent:#40e0d0;--accent2:#5cf0e0;--green:#2ecc8a;--red:#ff6b7a;
        --blue:#60c8f0;--text:#f0fafa;--muted:#7ecfda;
        }
        [data-theme="noche"] {
        --bg:#050505;--surface:#0f0f0f;--surface2:#1a1a1a;--border:#2a2a2a;
        --accent:#ffffff;--accent2:#e0e0e0;--green:#50e090;--red:#ff5566;
        --blue:#60a8ff;--text:#ffffff;--muted:#606060;
        }
        [data-theme="pastel"] {
        --bg:#f4f0fa;--surface:#fdfbff;--surface2:#ede8f8;--border:#d4c8f0;
        --accent:#9b7fd4;--accent2:#b89ae8;--green:#6dbf8a;--red:#e88a8a;
        --blue:#7ab4e8;--text:#2a1f40;--muted:#9488b4;
        }
        [data-theme="grafito"] {
        --bg:#1a1c1e;--surface:#242628;--surface2:#2e3032;--border:#3a3c3e;
        --accent:#e8d06a;--accent2:#f0dc80;--green:#5ec480;--red:#e06868;
        --blue:#68a8e0;--text:#e8eaec;--muted:#7a7c80;
        }
        [data-theme="turquesa"] body,[data-theme="noche"] body,[data-theme="grafito"] body{background:var(--bg)}
        [data-theme="turquesa"] header,[data-theme="turquesa"] .nav-tabs{background:rgba(13,61,74,0.97)}
        [data-theme="noche"] header,[data-theme="noche"] .nav-tabs{background:rgba(5,5,5,0.98)}
        [data-theme="grafito"] header,[data-theme="grafito"] .nav-tabs{background:rgba(26,28,30,0.97)}
        /* Theme picker popup */
        .theme-picker {
        position: relative;
        display: inline-block;
        }
        .theme-dropdown {
        display: none;
        position: absolute;
        top: calc(100% + 8px);
        right: 0;
        background: var(--surface);
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 10px;
        z-index: 500;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        min-width: 220px;
        animation: dropIn 0.15s ease;
        }
        @keyframes dropIn { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-6px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
        .theme-dropdown.open { display: block; }
        .theme-dropdown-title {
        font-size: 9px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        color: var(--muted);
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        padding: 0 4px;
        font-family: var(--font-body);
        font-weight: 500;
        }
        .theme-options {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        gap: 6px;
        }
        .theme-opt {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
        padding: 8px 6px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: 1.5px solid transparent;
        transition: all 0.15s;
        font-size: 10px;
        font-family: var(--font-body);
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--muted);
        letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }
        .theme-opt:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--text); background: var(--surface2); }
        .theme-opt.active { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); background: var(--surface2); }
        .theme-swatch {
        width: 36px;
        height: 22px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        }
        .theme-swatch::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        left: 0; top: 0;
        width: 60%;
        height: 100%;
        }
        .theme-swatch::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        right: 0; top: 0;
        <button class="mobile-more-item" onclick="switchTabMobile('viajes')"><span class="mobile-more-item-icon">✈</span> Viajes</button>
        <button class="mobile-more-item" onclick="switchTabMobile('gastos_extra')"><span class="mobile-more-item-icon">📅</span> Extras</button>
        <button class="mobile-more-item" onclick="switchTabMobile('cierre')"><span class="mobile-more-item-icon">📊</span> Cierre mes</button>
        <button class="mobile-more-item" onclick="switchTabMobile('agenda')"><span class="mobile-more-item-icon">🗓</span> Agenda</button>
        <button class="mobile-more-item" onclick="switchTabMobile('bonus')"><span class="mobile-more-item-icon">🎁</span> Bonus</button>
        </div>
        <nav class="mobile-tabbar" id="mobileTabbar">
        <button class="mobile-tabbar-btn active" id="mtab-resumen" onclick="switchTabMobile('resumen')">
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-icon">🏠</span>
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-label">Resumen</span>
        </button>
        <button class="mobile-tabbar-btn" id="mtab-transacciones" onclick="switchTabMobile('transacciones')">
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-icon">💳</span>
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-label">Gastos</span>
        </button>
        <button class="mobile-tabbar-btn" id="mtab-inversiones" onclick="switchTabMobile('inversiones')">
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-icon">📈</span>
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-label">Fondos</span>
        </button>
        <button class="mobile-tabbar-btn" id="mtab-patrimonio" onclick="switchTabMobile('patrimonio')">
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-icon">💎</span>
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-label">Patrimonio</span>
        </button>
        <button class="mobile-tabbar-btn" id="mtab-more" onclick="toggleMobileMore()">
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-icon">⋯</span>
        <span class="mobile-tabbar-label">Más</span>
        </button>
        </nav>
        <script>
        function switchTabMobile(name) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
        const tabContent = document.getElementById('tab-' + name);
        if (tabContent) tabContent.classList.add('active');
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => {
        if (t.getAttribute('onclick') && t.getAttribute('onclick').includes("'" + name + "'")) {
        t.classList.add('active');
        }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tabbar-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        const mBtn = document.getElementById('mtab-' + name);
        if (mBtn) mBtn.classList.add('active');
        closeMobileMore();
        window.scrollTo(0, 0);
        setTimeout(() => { if(typeof renderAll === 'function') renderAll(); }, 80);
        }
        function toggleMobileMore() {
        document.getElementById('moreMenu').classList.toggle('open');
        document.getElementById('moreOverlay').classList.toggle('open');
        }
        function closeMobileMore() {
        document.getElementById('moreMenu').classList.remove('open');
        document.getElementById('moreOverlay').classList.remove('open');
        }
        // Detectar teclado iOS/Android: ocultar tab bar cuando el teclado está activo
        if (window.visualViewport) {
        let lastH = window.visualViewport.height;
        window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', () => {
        const currentH = window.visualViewport.height;
        if (currentH < lastH - 100) {
        // Teclado abierto
        document.body.classList.add('keyboard-open');
        } else {
        // Teclado cerrado
        document.body.classList.remove('keyboard-open');
        }
        lastH = currentH;
        });
        }
        </script>
        </body></html>
